meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.18 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] The inline forward-reference 横組み ［＃「X」は横組み］ (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html) sets a single run horizontally inside vertical text. Per §7.5 it consumes the preceding target literal 西暦 and yields an emphasis node; §8 renders <span class="aozora-yokogumi">. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model; cross-checked against the reference processor.
